author: sukunrt
content:
I just made this PR that allows republishing(forwarding) attestations which were ignored when they were received. They were ignored because the node didn't have the corresponding block.
https://github.com/libp2p/go-libp2p-pubsub/pull/719

Do other CLs forward the attestations when the block is received?

author: tersec
content: Nimbus doesn't. This is a major change

author: tersec
content: "allows republishing", i.e. "allows consuming significantly more resources". Is it attestation-specific?

author: tersec
content: and this also disables a certain aspect of DoS-protection on the network

author: sukunrt
content:
The motivation is attestations.
Do you process them when you receive the block?

author: sukunrt
content:
Like? I assume you'll limit the number of entries that are enqueued for later processing.
The other alternative then is for attestors to just attest at 4s mark. How would they know if the peers have the block?

author: tersec
content: ah, I see what you mean

author: tersec
content: ok, it's safety-neutral, but no, Nimbus doesn't do this
